definition.procedurexml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="event_trigger" deletable="false" x="40" y="40"><field name="trigger">no_ext_trigger</field><next><block type="entity_set_nogravity"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value><value name="gravityValue"><block type="logic_boolean"><field name="BOOL">TRUE</field></block></value><next><block type="play_sound"><field name="sound">entity.wither.shoot</field><field name="soundcategory">neutral</field><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><value name="level"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value><value name="pitch"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></block></value><next><block type="wait"><value name="ticks"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">10</field></block></value><statement name="do"><block type="spawn_particle_multi"><field name="particle">GLOW</field><value name="count"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">5</field></block></value><value name="x"><block type="coord_x"></block></value><value name="y"><block type="coord_y"></block></value><value name="z"><block type="coord_z"></block></value><value name="dx"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0.3</field></block></value><value name="dy"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0.3</field></block></value><value name="dz"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0.3</field></block></value><value name="speed"><block type="math_number"><field name="NUM">0.1</field></block></value><next><block type="entity_despawn"><value name="entity"><block type="entity_from_deps"></block></value></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
